meta.description: Skill trees for all 6 character classes. 1 skill point earned per level up. Skills unlock at specified levels.

types.active: Triggered by specific actions or commands
types.ultimate: Powerful capstone ability, one per class

gigachad_builder.name: Gigachad Builder
gigachad_builder.description: The supreme builder. Ships features, designs systems, creates products.
gigachad_builder.bonus: +1 Creativity per lesson, +20% XP for shipping features

skills.name: Blueprint Vision
skills.description: See the structure of any project before building it. +1 Creativity on plan mode lessons.

skills.name: Quick Scaffold
skills.description: Create project structures faster. +5 XP when creating new files.

skills.name: Feature Factory
skills.description: Building features earns double Aura.

skills.name: Architect's Eye
skills.description: Understand complex file structures at a glance. +2 Accuracy on file navigation tasks.

skills.name: Ship It
skills.description: Completing product-building lessons gives +25 bonus XP.

skills.name: MVP Mindset
skills.description: Focus on what matters. Skip optional sub-tasks without penalty.

skills.name: Full Stack Vision
skills.description: See how frontend and backend connect. +2 to all stats on web project lessons.

skills.name: Production Ready
skills.description: Deployment lessons give triple Aura.

skills.name: Code Review Master
skills.description: Understand code quality patterns. +3 Accuracy permanently.

skills.name: System Designer
skills.description: Design multi-file systems. +50 XP on architecture lessons.

skills.name: Open Source Chad
skills.description: GitHub operations give double XP.

skills.name: Iteration King
skills.description: Refactoring lessons give +3 to all stats.

skills.name: Tech Lead
skills.description: Multi-agent workflow lessons give +5 Efficiency.

skills.name: Startup Mode
skills.description: Shipping a complete product gives +100 bonus XP and +50 Aura.

skills.name: Godmode: Builder's Paradise
skills.description: ULTIMATE - All building tasks give double XP, double Aura, and +2 to all stats.

sigma_grinder.name: Sigma Grinder
sigma_grinder.description: The relentless optimizer. Speed, efficiency, and grinding streaks.

skills.name: Quick Fingers
skills.description: Terminal commands feel faster. +1 Speed on all terminal tasks.

skills.name: Streak Shield
skills.description: Gain an extra streak freeze per week.

skills.name: Early Bird
skills.description: First lesson of the day gives +5 bonus XP.

skills.name: Shortcut Master
skills.description: Keyboard shortcut lessons give +2 Speed.

skills.name: Automation Instinct
skills.description: Automation lessons give double XP.

skills.name: Streak Multiplier
skills.description: Every 3-day streak gives +10 bonus XP on next lesson.

skills.name: Pipeline Pro
skills.description: Git workflow lessons give +3 Efficiency.

skills.name: Zero Downtime
skills.description: Never lose progress from errors. Mistakes give +1 Speed instead of nothing.

skills.name: Batch Processing
skills.description: Complete 2+ tasks in rapid succession for combo XP (+5 per combo).

skills.name: Terminal Warrior
skills.description: All terminal tasks give +15 bonus XP.

skills.name: Infinite Grind
skills.description: Daily cap raised to 5 lessons before easter egg triggers.

skills.name: Muscle Memory
skills.description: Repeated command patterns give +2 Speed permanently.

skills.name: Flow State
skills.description: 3+ lessons in a session gives +20% XP for remaining lessons.

skills.name: Streak Legend
skills.description: 30-day streak gives permanent +5 to Speed and Efficiency.

skills.name: Lone Wolf: Terminal Domination
skills.description: ULTIMATE - All Speed and Efficiency gains are doubled permanently.

aura_farmer.name: Aura Farmer
aura_farmer.description: The flex master. Maximum Aura generation, cosmetics collector, social status king.
aura_farmer.bonus: +2 Aura per lesson, +25% Aura from all sources

skills.name: Aura Magnet
skills.description: All sources of Aura give +1 extra.

skills.name: Cosmetic Sense
skills.description: Unlock 2 free cosmetic items from the shop.

skills.name: First Impression
skills.description: Status display looks extra flashy. +1 Aura per session start.

skills.name: Glow Up
skills.description: Aura glow level advances 25% faster.

skills.name: Discount Hunter
skills.description: All cosmetic shop items cost 20% less Aura.

skills.name: Streak Flex
skills.description: Streaks give double Aura rewards.

skills.name: Collection Bonus
skills.description: Every 5 cosmetics owned gives +10 Aura bonus.

skills.name: Reputation Builder
skills.description: Reputation rank advances 50% faster.

skills.name: Golden Touch
skills.description: Every task completion gives +3 Aura in addition to normal rewards.

skills.name: Flex Master
skills.description: Unlock exclusive Aura Farmer cosmetics not available to other classes.

skills.name: Aura Overflow
skills.description: When Aura exceeds 500, earn +5 XP per lesson passively.

skills.name: VIP Status
skills.description: Unlock the VIP terminal theme and aura color.

skills.name: Social Proof
skills.description: Leaderboard features give bonus visibility (Coming Soon).

skills.name: Aura Millionaire
skills.description: All Aura earnings permanently doubled.

skills.name: Influencer Maximus: Infinite Drip
skills.description: ULTIMATE - Aura generation triples. Exclusive legendary cosmetics unlock. Status display becomes animated.

chaos_agent.name: NPC Destroyer / Chaos Agent
chaos_agent.description: The wild card. Easter eggs, creative exploits, breaking expectations.
chaos_agent.bonus: +1 Creativity and +1 Speed per lesson, 2x easter egg rewards

skills.name: Curiosity Killed Nothing
skills.description: Exploring unexpected paths gives +2 XP.

skills.name: Error Whisperer
skills.description: Making mistakes gives +1 Speed instead of nothing.

skills.name: Easter Egg Radar
skills.description: Easter eggs are easier to trigger (3 lessons instead of 4).

skills.name: Unconventional Methods
skills.description: Solving tasks in unexpected ways gives +10 bonus XP.

skills.name: Glitch Hunter
skills.description: Finding bugs or unexpected behaviors earns +5 Aura.

skills.name: Chaos Multiplier
skills.description: Easter egg rewards are tripled (stacks with class bonus).

skills.name: Rule Bender
skills.description: Unlock hidden alternative solutions to standard tasks.

skills.name: Controlled Demolition
skills.description: Breaking things intentionally teaches +3 Accuracy.

skills.name: Secret Paths
skills.description: Discover hidden lessons not on the main curriculum (+25 XP each).

skills.name: Exploit Developer
skills.description: Debugging lessons give +20 XP and +3 Speed.

skills.name: Chaos Theory
skills.description: Random +5-20 bonus XP on any lesson (unpredictable).

skills.name: System Exploit
skills.description: Find ways to earn Aura from non-standard sources.

skills.name: Reality Hacker
skills.description: Unlock the ability to modify your own progress.json (with guidance).

skills.name: Agent of Chaos
skills.description: All unconventional approaches give triple rewards.

skills.name: System Breaker: Reality Collapse
skills.description: ULTIMATE - Easter eggs can appear anywhere. All chaos bonuses stack infinitely. Unlock the secret Module 0.

meme_lord.name: Meme Lord / Shitposter
meme_lord.description: The entertainer. Fun content, humor, casual vibes, creative expression.
meme_lord.bonus: +1 Creativity per lesson, unlocks humor content

skills.name: Comedic Timing
skills.description: Status displays include random jokes. +1 Creativity.

skills.name: Meme Knowledge
skills.description: References and jokes in celebrations. +1 Aura.

skills.name: Casual Mode
skills.description: Relaxed learning pace feels natural. +1 Speed on easy tasks.

skills.name: Shitpost Mastery
skills.description: Creative file names and commit messages earn +5 Aura.

skills.name: Based Takes
skills.description: Original approaches to problems earn +10 bonus XP.

skills.name: Vibe Check
skills.description: Session starts include a random vibe check. Pass it for +3 Aura.

skills.name: Content Creator
skills.description: README and documentation tasks give double XP (because funny docs are rare).

skills.name: Viral Potential
skills.description: Shipping features gives +10 Aura for 'content potential'.

skills.name: Inside Jokes
skills.description: Unlock hidden meme-themed cosmetics and achievements.

skills.name: Main Character Energy
skills.description: Level-up animations are extra dramatic and funny.

skills.name: Touch Grass Immunity
skills.description: Long sessions (4+ lessons) give bonus rewards instead of burnout warnings.

skills.name: Legendary Commit Messages
skills.description: Git lessons give +15 Aura for creative commit messages.

skills.name: Ratio Master
skills.description: Completing challenges earns triple Aura (the ultimate flex).

skills.name: Based Economy
skills.description: All Aura earnings +50%. Shop prices reduced 30%.

skills.name: Based Deity: Transcendence
skills.description: ULTIMATE - All celebrations become legendary memes. +5 all stats. Unlock the Meme Lord exclusive soundtrack.

hackerman.name: Hackerman / Code Wizard
hackerman.description: The technical master. Advanced features, automation, deep understanding.
hackerman.bonus: +1 Efficiency per lesson, unlock advanced features earlier

skills.name: Config Whisperer
skills.description: JSON and config file tasks give +2 Efficiency.

skills.name: Debug Mode
skills.description: Error messages become learning opportunities. +1 Accuracy per error encountered.

skills.name: Script Starter
skills.description: Automation concepts come naturally. +1 Efficiency.

skills.name: Pattern Recognition
skills.description: Recognize code patterns faster. +2 Accuracy on code reading tasks.

skills.name: Power User
skills.description: Advanced CLI features unlock 1 module earlier than normal.

skills.name: API Intuition
skills.description: API and tool integration lessons give +15 XP.

skills.name: Code Archaeology
skills.description: Reading and understanding existing code gives +3 Accuracy.

skills.name: Automation Master
skills.description: Automated workflows give triple XP.

skills.name: MCP Specialist
skills.description: MCP lessons give double XP and +5 Efficiency.

skills.name: Deep Dive
skills.description: Understanding advanced concepts gives permanent stat boosts.

skills.name: Wizard's Library
skills.description: Unlock reference materials and cheat sheets for all modules.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Commander
skills.description: Agent workflow lessons give +25 XP and +5 Efficiency.

skills.name: Zero Bug Tolerance
skills.description: Debugging and testing lessons give +3 to all stats.

skills.name: Full Automation
skills.description: Autonomous mode lessons give +50 XP and permanent +5 Efficiency.

skills.name: Code Wizard: Matrix Mastery
skills.description: ULTIMATE - All technical lessons give triple XP. Unlock exclusive advanced curriculum. Terminal theme becomes animated Matrix style.
